ops.title: Fix pre-existing golangci-lint debt failing CI lint job
ops.description: CI lint job fails on main with 9 pre-existing issues (errcheck 4, gofumpt 3, prealloc 1, staticcheck 1): https://github.com/yasyf/cc-orchestrate/actions/runs/29490848248 — failing since before the guides migration commit 2127c1ead6 (98e6bf54, a non-docs commit, failed the same job; likely a golangci-lint version bump started flagging existing code). Docs-only commits inherit the red lint job.

ops.text: CI lint job green on main
